page_content:
MEES699 Special Problems in Marine-Estuarine-Environmental Sciences (1-3 Credits)

Research on specialized topics under the direction of individual faculty members.

MEES708 Advanced Topics in Marine-Estuarine-Environmental Science (1-4 Credits)

Lectures, experimental courses and other specialized graduate training in various relevant disciplines.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

MEES712 Advanced Population Dynamics and Assessment (4 Credits) Quantitative and modeling skills, including understanding of population dynamics and responses of populations to exploitation and management actions. Coverage of population models of production, mortality, stock and recruitment, age and growth, and harvesting, and methods for using these models to provide management advice.
